Tooltip_NoMercyDeck:
A 168-card UNO No Mercy deck.

Place it on a table or the ground, then right-click it to play or watch.

Supports 2-6 players, spectators, bots, stacking, an optional 25-card Mercy Rule, optional 0/7 hand rules, and Color Roulette.

Playing improves mood. Winning provides an additional happiness boost.
